title: Hidden Meanings
storySnippet: A mysterious fountain in the courtyard tests Lira with words that carry hidden depth.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The famous author wrote under a ___ to keep her real identity a secret.
data.definition: Pseudonym: a fake name used by a writer or other person to hide their true identity.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The northern lights are a natural ___ that attracts visitors from around the world.
data.definition: Phenomenon: a remarkable event or fact that can be observed, especially one whose cause is not fully understood.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The friendly ___ between the teammates kept everyone laughing during the bus ride.
data.definition: Banter: playful and friendly exchange of teasing remarks.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The school library was ___ enough to hold thousands of books and a reading lounge.
data.definition: Capacious: having a lot of space inside; roomy and spacious.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The new student seemed ___ at first, standing apart from the group at recess.
data.definition: Aloof: distant and uninvolved; not friendly or interested in others.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Jake is an ___ reader who finishes at least two books every week.
data.definition: Avid: showing great enthusiasm and eagerness for something.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The ___ neighbor spent her weekends volunteering at the animal shelter.
data.definition: Benevolent: kind, generous, and caring about the well-being of others.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The reporter appreciated the mayor's ___ response instead of the usual rehearsed answers.
data.definition: Candid: truthful and straightforward; honest and open.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The ___ student reviewed her notes every evening and never missed an assignment.
data.definition: Diligent: showing careful and persistent effort in one's work or duties.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The speaker gave an ___ speech that moved the entire audience to applause.
data.definition: Eloquent: fluent, persuasive, and expressive in speaking or writing.
